facts.claim: Balmoral is a cruise ship owned and operated by Fred.
She was built in 1988 by the Meyer Werft shipyard in Papenburg, West Germany, as Crown Odyssey for Royal Cruise Line.
She has also sailed for the Norwegian Cruise Line as Norwegian Crown and Orient Lines as Crown Odyssey.
In 2007–2008 she was lengthened by 30 m (98 ft) at the Blohm + Voss shipyard in Hamburg prior to entering service with her current operator.
